## Summary

*One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why.*

## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial (typos, formatting, links)
- [ ] Clarification (no semantic change)
- [ ] Additive (new spec text, handbook chapter, example, ADR, diagram, research)
- [ ] Structural (layer / interface / principle / trust boundary)  →  ADR required

## Files touched

- `specification/…`
- `handbook/…`
- `diagrams/…`
- `examples/…`
- `adr/…`
- `research/…`
- `reference-implementation/…`
- `README.md` / `CONTRIBUTING.md` / `GOVERNANCE.md` / `ROADMAP.md` / `CHANGELOG.md`

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have updated [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) under `Unreleased`.
- [ ] I have used the correct terminology from [Spec 003](../specification/003-terminology.md).
- [ ] Content is **vendor-neutral** (vendor material lives only in Cloud Implementation subsections and covers ≥ 2 implementations).
- [ ] Any diagrams follow the palette in [`diagrams/high-level-architecture.md` §3](../diagrams/high-level-architecture.md).
- [ ] Structural changes are backed by an ADR with a 14-day public comment period.
- [ ] Links are workspace-relative and resolve.
- [ ] No secrets, no customer data, no proprietary content.

*Closes #…, References #…, ADR-…*
